name: ulak-os
description: Vendor-neutral prompt operating system for Claude Code / Codex / Gemini. Structured Phase 0→5 director protocol: environment lock → deep inventory → parallel specialist evidence → did-you-know discovery → synthesis → manager verdict. Audit, govern, and scaffold full-stack SaaS with 24 sector packs, 8 rule packs, 79 anti-patterns, 22 governance docs, 27 specialist agents, 9 slash-commands, 9 skills, 33 runtime rules, 15 scaffolder templates. Deep-inventory discipline rejects folder dumps; parallel specialist dispatch rejects single-agent evidence; validation gate rejects unverified signoff.
short_description: Phase 0→5 prompt OS: deep inventory, parallel specialist evidence, did-you-know discovery, validation gate, full-stack SaaS scaffolder.

install_notes.method_a: Clone: git clone https://github.com/osrt91/ulak-os.git && cd ulak-os
install_notes.method_b: As plugin (future): claude plugin install osrt91/ulak-os
install_notes.method_c: As submodule: git submodule add https://github.com/osrt91/ulak-os.git .ulak-os
install_notes.quickstart: After install, open Claude Code in any directory and run /director komple to audit OR /ulak-scaffold to start a new SaaS
